tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_layer_data module

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_layer_data.layer(mocker: MockerFixture) → LayerData
tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_layer_data.test_water_factor(water_content: float, field_capacity_content: float, wilting_point_content: float, saturation_content: float, expected: float) → None

Tests that water factor was calculated correctly

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_layer_data.test_water_filled_pore_space(layer: LayerData, mocker: MockerFixture, water: float, saturation: float, expected: float) → None

Tests that the water-filled pore space is calculated correctly for a soil layer.

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_layer_data.test_layer_thickness(top: float, bottom: float) → None

Test that the layer_thickness() in LayerData works as expected

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_layer_data.test_layer_thickness_error(top: float, bottom: float) → None

Test that layer_thickness() in LayerData throws errors when given invalid data

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_layer_data.test_post_init(top: float, bottom: float, concentration: float) → None

Test that __post_init__() runs and correctly initializes attributes in LayerData

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_layer_data.test_initialize_carbon_pools(field_size: float, top_depth: int, expected_active: float, expected_passive: float, expected_slow: float, expected_structural_litter: float, expected_metabolic_litter: float, residue: float) → None

Tests that carbon pools in a soil layer are properly initialized.

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_layer_data.test_depth_of_layer_center(top: float, bottom: float) → None

Test that depth_of_layer_center() in LayerData correctly determine the center depth

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_layer_data.test_field_capacity_content(top: float, bottom: float, field_concentration: float) → None

Test that field_capacity_content() in LayerData correctly calculates the field water content of the layer

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_layer_data.test_wilting_point_content(top: float, bottom: float, wilt_concentration: float) → None

Test that wilting_point_content() in LayerData calculates the wilting point content correctly

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_layer_data.test_saturation_content(saturation_concentration: float, layer_thickness: float) → None

Test that saturation_content() in LayerData calculates the saturation content of a soil layer correctly

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_layer_data.test_excess_water_available(water_content: float, field_capacity_content: float) → None

Test that excess_water_available() in LayerData correctly calculates the amount of excess water available in a layer

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_layer_data.test_acceptable_percolation_amount(water_content: float, saturation_content: float) → None

Test that acceptable_percolation_amount() in LayerData correctly calculates the maximum amount of water that can be percolated into it

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_layer_data.test_add_to_labile_phosphorus(added_phosphorus: float, initial_labile_phosphorus: float, field_size: float) → None

Tests that the labile phosphorus content of the top soil layer has phosphorus correctly added to it.

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_layer_data.test_add_to_active_phosphorus(added_phosphorus: float, initial_active_phosphorus: float, field_size: float) → None

Tests that the stable phosphorus content of the top soil layer has phosphorus correctly added to it.

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_layer_data.test_add_phosphorus_to_pool(pool: float, added_phosphorus: float, area: float) → None

Tests that this method correctly calculates the new value of the soil phosphorus pool being added to.

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_layer_data.test_calculate_phosphorus_sorption_parameter(clay: float, phosphorus: float, carbon: float) → None

Tests the that the phosphorus sorption parameter is calculated properly based on the clay, labile inorganic phosphorus, and carbon contents of the soil.

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_layer_data.test_determine_soil_nutrient_concentration(nutrient: float, density: float, depth: float, area: float) → None

Tests that the soil nutrient concentration is calculated correctly.

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_layer_data.test_determine_soil_nutrient_area_density(phosphorus: float, density: float, thickness: float, field_size: float) → None

Tests that the conversion from mg / kg soil to kg / ha is performed correctly.

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_layer_data.test_nutrient_cycling_temp_factor(temp: float) → None

Tests the nutrient cycling temperature factor is correctly calculated as a property of LayerData.

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_layer_data.test_nutrient_cycling_water_factor(water_content: float, field_capacity: float) → float

Tests that the nutrient cycling water factor is correctly calculated as a property of LayerData.

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_layer_data.test_carbon_residue_amount(metabolic: float, structural: float, expected: float, mocker: MockerFixture) → None

Test that the carbon_residue_amount adds carbon residue correctly.
